public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as toll witness.
manner: Treats loose talk like evidence waiting to harden into record and listens for contradiction before charm. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a toll witness still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of toll witness in and around Ironroot Crossing, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Ironroot Crossing workable through the obligations of toll witness while managing the immediate pressure of resource depletion in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must preserve sequence and custody even when powerful parties would prefer ambiguity. Around Ironroot Crossing, that usually means carrying resource depletion, sabotage, predatory frontier ecology without letting the role of toll witness visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Garren Rimeclasp can trade precise, actionable information once the party secures or clarifies the record they protect.
Garren Rimeclasp needs help resolving a missing ledger, inconsistent testimony, or tampered record tied to Ironroot Crossing.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Garren Rimeclasp communicates in public.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Ironroot Crossing: offices, toll points, ledgers, archives, or testimony desks
who_avoids_them: those hoping wording can stay vague
